problem: Generate comprehensive HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json file containing all Human Design concepts (Types, Authorities, Profiles, Channels, Centers, Gates, Definitions, Quarters) with 64keys↔traditional terminology mappings, structured for programmatic access and UI generation
goal: Produce production-ready HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json at /Users/nathan.neibauer/code/human-design/ontology/HD_ONTOLOGY_complete.json with complete, validated ontological data enabling chart interpretation, UI labels, and educational content generation

existing_data_sources: src/human_design/bodygraph.yaml - 64 gates with zodiac coordinates and Ra descriptions
src/human_design/channels.yaml - 36 channels as gate pairs with names
src/human_design/models/core.py - Type-safe Literal definitions (GateNumber, CenterName, GateLineNumber)
architectural_foundation.pattern: Raw calculations separate from semantic content - ontology provides semantic layer for interpretations
architectural_foundation.terminology_standard: Primary: 64keys (Initiator/Builder/Specialist/Coordinator/Observer), Secondary: Traditional (Manifestor/Generator/etc) in traditional_name fields

from_review_strand_d5a05df6.rationale: Required for Type/Authority/Profile calculations and complete chart interpretations
from_review_strand_d5a05df6.partial_structure_provided: Review strand spec includes skeleton structure for types, authorities, profiles, channels, centers, quarters

rebecca_energy_context.tone: Whimsical yet grounded, cozy autumnal forest, twilight magic
rebecca_energy_context.use_case: Rebecca switches rapidly between chart combinations during sessions - needs fast access to interpretation data

constraints: Work in strand fork space (automatic isolation branch)
Source data from existing YAML files (bodygraph.yaml, channels.yaml, centers.yaml)
JSON must be valid RFC 8259 (strict syntax)
success_criteria: All 5 Types with calculation logic, strategies, not-self themes
All 7 Authorities with hierarchy and decision strategies
All 36 Channels with gate pairs, centers, circuits
All 64 Gates with I Ching names and center assignments
4 Quarters with gate ranges and themes
Terminology consistency: 100% match with core.py types
Data integrity: gate-to-center mappings validated against centers.yaml
Channel gate pairs validated against channels.yaml

1_domain_research.description: Extract and structure HD concepts from existing codebase and domain knowledge

tasks.task: Research and document Types, Authorities, Profiles, Definitions with calculation logic and interpretation content. Reference: Review strand SPEC_ontologist.md, HD reference materials.
Extract and enrich Gates, Channels, Centers, Quarters from YAML files with circuit mappings and themes. Reference: bodygraph.yaml, channels.yaml, centers.yaml.

2_schema_design.description: Design JSON schema structure, relationships, and validation rules

tasks.task: Design complete JSON Schema v7 definition with proper typing, enums, relationships, and extensibility hooks. Inputs: PHASE_1 outputs.

3_validation.description: Validate ontology completeness, consistency, and accuracy against codebase

tasks.task: Audit ontology data for completeness, validate against existing YAML/Python code, check terminology consistency. Check: core.py, bodygraph.yaml, channels.yaml, centers.yaml.

4_synthesis.description: Produce final artifacts with documentation and implementation guidance

tasks.task: Synthesize validated ontology into production files, generate documentation, recommend implementation patterns and tests. Inputs: All phase outputs, VALIDATION_REPORT.

semantic: All 64 GateNumbers (1-64) present with unique entries
All 9 CenterNames match core.py Literal type exactly
All 36 channel gate pairs match channels.yaml

metadata.isolation: automatic git fork and branch creation
